name: minecraft-server
description:
CraftControl

A highly automated, zero-friction web control panel and local agent for deploying and managing Minecraft servers.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:agent"
scripts.test:e2e: concurrently -k -s first "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cd Minecraft-Server-Manager-Web && npm run cypress:run"
scripts.test:e2e:ui: concurrently -k -s first "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cd Minecraft-Server-Manager-Web && npm run cypress:open"
